Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Item ID
Fields.Description: Reference item ID. Used to bring in the gesture text ID, icon ID, and sort ID for each menu. Register the tool ID of the equipment parameter

Fields.Name: Message Anim ID
Fields.Description: Anime ID for attaching messages. Specify the animation ID when attaching a message

Fields.Name: Cannot Use while Riding
Fields.Description: Is it prohibited to use while riding (default )? If , it cannot be used while riding
